title: Zentra Bot
subtitle: Agent access
heading: Operative sign-in
description: Sign in with your email and password to view your profile.
forgotPasswordNoEmail: Enter your email to request a password reset.
forgotPasswordInfo: Please select your company first, or contact your administrator.
sessionExpired: Your agent session expired. Please sign in again.
tenantSelectDescription: We found multiple companies linked to your account. Which one will you use?
noTenantsError: No active companies found for this user. Contact your administrator.

errors.generic: Could not sign in. Please try again.
errors.inactive: Your agent access is inactive. Contact your administrator.
errors.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes before trying again.
